category_sources: source_facts.description says this is an XSL-FO print formatter for making PDF or PS documents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache XML Graphics FOP page.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Apache FOP documentation site; the quickstart guide is under the same official site.
repo_sources: Apache FOP is an Apache XML Graphics project; official source is mirrored in the Apache GitHub organization.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies XSL-FO PDF/PS formatting; source_facts.license identifies it as an Apache-licensed project.
